task_completion.description: Create the conditions file with the 15 target words.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, spreadsheet, or terminal showing 'word_list.csv' with the header 'word' and the 15 target nouns, OR the PsychoPy loop dialog showing 15 conditions loaded from 'word_list.csv'.

task_completion.description: Construct the correct routine sequence in the Flow panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flow panel at the bottom of PsychoPy Builder shows the following sequence: 'instructions', a loop enclosing 'study', 'transition', 'recall', and 'thanks'.

task_completion.description: Configure the study routine to display the word for 2.0 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties dialog for the Text component in the 'study' routine shows the Text field set to '$word' and the Stop duration/time set to 2.0.

task_completion.description: Configure the loop around the study routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The loop properties dialog shows the loopType set to 'sequential' and the Conditions file set to 'word_list.csv' (or its absolute path).

task_completion.description: Configure the transition routine to last 3.0 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties dialog for a component within the 'transition' routine shows a Stop duration/time of 3.0 seconds.

task_completion.description: Configure the recall routine with an editable TextBox for 90 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties dialog for the TextBox component in the 'recall' routine shows the Name as 'recall_box', Stop duration/time as 90 (or 90.0), and the 'Editable' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Save the experiment to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy window title bar or a file manager shows the experiment saved as 'free_recall.psyexp' in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PsychoPy Builder interface being actively used, rather than just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent manually configured components using GUI dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Component properties dialogs (e.g., Text, TextBox, Loop) should be visible in the screenshots, indicating manual setup.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by writing the .psyexp XML file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen editing 'free_recall.psyexp' in a text editor like VS Code, Nano, or Vim.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment file must be saved to '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/free_recall.psyexp'. The conditions file must be saved to '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/word_list.csv'. The conditions file must contain exactly these 15 words under a 'word' header: Apple, Bridge, Camera, Doctor, Engine, Forest, Guitar, Harbor, Island, Jungle, Kettle, Lemon, Magnet, Number, Office.
